## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change that solves it.

## Testing

- [ ] `node --check popup.js`
- [ ] `node --check background.js`
- [ ] `node scripts/validate.mjs`
- [ ] Tested the affected behavior in an unpacked Chrome extension

## Privacy and permissions

- [ ] This change adds no permission or data-handling change.
- [ ] Any permission or data-handling change is explained and documented in `README.md` and `PRIVACY.md`.

## Visual changes

Add before-and-after images when the popup appearance changes, or write “Not applicable.”

## Related issue

Link the issue when one exists.
